statement: STEP 1 trial primary result: semaglutide 2.4 mg achieved 14.9% weight loss at 68 weeks.
STEP 3 trial: semaglutide 2.4 mg combined with intensive behavioral therapy achieved 16.0% weight loss at 68 weeks.
STEP 5 long-term trial: semaglutide 2.4 mg achieved 17.4% weight loss at 104 weeks.
Network meta-analysis found semaglutide among most effective GLP-1 agonists for obesity.
STEP 1 safety: nausea was most common adverse event at 44.2% incidence in semaglutide arm.
Discontinuation rate due to adverse events was 3.4% in STEP 3 semaglutide arm.
